eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Wayne, MI; at 12:48 PM ON JAN 30, 2026 Effective until 01:48 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: THIS IS A TEST, THIS IS A TEST. The Wayne County Department of Homeland Security and Emergency Management has issued an ALERT TEST via the Integrated Public Alert and Warning System for residents, businesses, and visitors. THIS IS ONLY A TEST. Had this been a real emergency, recommended actions would have followed. No response is required - Test complete.
